name: mcp-sam-gov
description: 36 keyless tools for US federal contracting + spending + regulation: SAM.gov, USAspending, Federal Register, eCFR, Grants.gov.
long_description:
One-click Claude Desktop extension. Search SAM.gov opportunities, pull RFP attachments, analyze USAspending awards (recipients, sub-agencies, time-series, NAICS / PSC / state / CFDA breakdowns), browse Federal Register rules, search eCFR / FAR regulations, and discover Grants.gov opportunities — all without registering an API key. Anti-hallucination autocomplete tools (NAICS, recipient, agency) keep responses grounded in real federal data.

Works with Claude Desktop on macOS and Windows. Auth: zero. Set SAM_GOV_API_KEY only if you need higher SAM.gov rate limits or archives older than 12 months.

tools.name: sam_search_opportunities
tools.description: Search SAM.gov federal contracting opportunities (keyless)

tools.name: sam_get_opportunity
tools.description: Get full detail for a single SAM.gov notice by 32-char hex noticeId

tools.name: sam_fetch_description
tools.description: Get the full RFP body text as plain text

tools.name: sam_attachment_url
tools.description: Build the public download URL for an attachment resourceId

tools.name: sam_lookup_organization
tools.description: Resolve a SAM.gov federal-organization id to its full path name

tools.name: usas_search_awards
tools.description: Aggregate share-of-wallet at agency × NAICS × fiscal year

tools.name: usas_search_individual_awards
tools.description: Line-item federal contracts (recipient + amount + sub-agency + state + description)

tools.name: usas_search_subagency_spending
tools.description: Break down agency spending by sub-agency / office

tools.name: usas_lookup_agency
tools.description: Resolve agency abbreviation ('VA') to canonical name + toptier code

tools.name: usas_search_awards_by_recipient
tools.description: Recipient win history at agency × NAICS slice

tools.name: usas_search_subawards
tools.description: Subcontracts on prime awards — supply-chain map

tools.name: usas_search_expiring_contracts
tools.description: Recompete radar — contracts expiring in next N months

tools.name: usas_get_award_detail
tools.description: Per-award rich detail (period of performance, options, set-aside, competition)

tools.name: usas_spending_over_time
tools.description: Time-series — group by fiscal_year / quarter / month

tools.name: usas_search_psc_spending
tools.description: Spending by Product Service Code (PSC)

tools.name: usas_search_state_spending
tools.description: Geographic — top states by federal $

tools.name: usas_search_cfda_spending
tools.description: Grant program (CFDA) breakdown

tools.name: usas_search_federal_account_spending
tools.description: Map money to budget line items (Treasury Account Symbols)

tools.name: usas_search_agency_spending
tools.description: Top buying agencies for a NAICS / set-aside

tools.name: usas_get_agency_profile
tools.description: Agency mission, abbreviation, website, subtier count

tools.name: usas_get_agency_awards_summary
tools.description: High-level agency award activity (transaction count + obligations)

tools.name: usas_get_agency_budget_function
tools.description: Budget breakdown by program area

tools.name: usas_search_recipients
tools.description: Search USAspending recipient list with parent/child hierarchy

tools.name: usas_get_recipient_profile
tools.description: Full recipient detail (DUNS, UEI, alternate names, business types, totals)

tools.name: usas_autocomplete_naics
tools.description: Autocomplete NAICS codes — anti-hallucination guard

tools.name: usas_autocomplete_recipient
tools.description: Autocomplete recipient names — anti-hallucination guard

tools.name: usas_naics_hierarchy
tools.description: Navigate NAICS tree (2-digit → 6-digit)

tools.name: usas_glossary
tools.description: 151 federal-spending terms (TAS, obligation vs outlay, etc.)

tools.name: usas_list_toptier_agencies
tools.description: List all toptier federal agencies + current FY obligations

tools.name: fed_register_search_documents
tools.description: Search Federal Register rules / notices / proclamations

tools.name: fed_register_get_document
tools.description: Federal Register document detail (citation, body URL, CFR refs)

tools.name: fed_register_list_agencies
tools.description: List Federal Register agencies + slugs

tools.name: ecfr_search
tools.description: Full-text search across CFR (Title 48 = FAR)

tools.name: ecfr_list_titles
tools.description: List all 50 CFR titles + last-amended dates

tools.name: grants_search
tools.description: Search Grants.gov federal grant opportunities

tools.name: grants_get_opportunity
tools.description: Federal grant detail (description, dates, award ceiling, applicant types)

sam_gov_api_key.title: SAM.gov API key (optional)
sam_gov_api_key.description: Leave blank for keyless mode. Set this only if you need higher SAM.gov rate limits or archives older than 12 months. Get a free key at https://sam.gov/SAM/pages/public/searchKeyData.jsf
